digitally-sign-pdf-page-one.title: Digitally Sign PDF on First Page
digitally-sign-pdf-page-one.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfFileSignature, set a certificate, and add a digital signature to the first page.

add-second-digital-signature-page-three.title: Add a second digital signature on page three of a PDF
add-second-digital-signature-page-three.description: Demonstrates adding two digital signatures to a PDF, with the second placed on page three using a different rectangle area.

signature-custom-appearance.title: Configure SignatureCustomAppearance with Foreground Image and Background Color
signature-custom-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to set a background color and draw the signature image as a foreground image using SignatureCustomAppearance before signing a PDF.

sign-pdf-empty-signature-fields.title: Sign PDF with Empty Reason, Contact, and Location
sign-pdf-empty-signature-fields.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while suppressing the reason, contact, and location text by setting them to empty strings.

set-french-language-signature.title: Set French Language for Digital Signature Caption
set-french-language-signature.description: Demonstrates how to change the language of a digital signature caption to French by setting the SignatureCustomAppearance culture before signing a PDF.

remove-pdf-signature.title: Remove Specific Signature from PDF
remove-pdf-signature.description: Demonstrates how to remove a digital signature named 'ApprovalSignature' from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature.

verify-pdf-signature.title: Verify PDF Signature 'ContractSigner'
verify-pdf-signature.description: Shows how to check for a digital signature named 'ContractSigner' in a PDF and verify its validity using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-signature.title: Validate PDF Signature Integrity
validate-pdf-signature.description: Demonstrates how to verify the cryptographic integrity of a PDF signature field named 'ManagerSignature' using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-signing-certificate.title: Extract Signing Certificate from PDF Signature Field
extract-signing-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to extract the X.509 certificate from a PDF signature field named 'LegalSignature' and save it as a .cer file.

extract-signature-image.title: Extract Signature Field Image to PNG
extract-signature-image.description: Demonstrates extracting the image from a signature form field named 'WitnessSignature' and saving it as a PNG file.

custom-signature-appearance.title: Create Custom Signature Appearance without Default Caption
custom-signature-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF signature field with a custom appearance that hides the default 'Digitally signed by' label.

sign-pdf-pfx.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate
sign-pdf-pfx.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using a password‑protected PFX certificate.

remove-signature-with-error-handling.title: Remove Specific Signature with Error Handling
remove-signature-with-error-handling.description: Shows how to safely remove a named digital signature from a PDF, checking for its existence and handling cases where the signature is missing.

verify-pdf-signatures.title: Verify PDF Signatures and Log Results to JSON
verify-pdf-signatures.description: Loads a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature, and writes the signature name and validation status to a JSON file.

add-digital-signature.title: Add Digital Signature with Reason and Location
add-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible digital signature to a PDF and set the signature reason and location using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-field.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF
add-signature-field.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field to a specific page and then signing the PDF using a certificate.

extract-certificate-details.title: Extract Certificate Issuer and Expiration from Signed PDF
extract-certificate-details.description: Demonstrates how to read a signed PDF, retrieve each signature's X.509 certificate, and display its issuer and expiration date.

pdf-signature-report.title: Generate PDF Signature Report
pdf-signature-report.description: Creates a PDF summarizing each digital signature's name, signer, and verification result from an existing PDF.

remove-all-signatures.title: Remove All Signatures from PDF
remove-all-signatures.description: Demonstrates how to remove every digital signature from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade and save a clean copy.

verify-multiple-signatures.title: Verify Multiple Signatures in PDF
verify-multiple-signatures.description: Demonstrates how to list all signature names in a PDF and verify each signature using PdfFileSignature.VerifySigned.

extract-signature-images-html.title: Extract Signature Images and Generate HTML Report
extract-signature-images-html.description: Extracts signature images from a signed PDF and creates an HTML file that displays each signature image for visual inspection.

set-signature-background.title: Set Semi-Transparent Background for PDF Signature Appearance
set-signature-background.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF signature's custom appearance with a semi‑transparent background color using Aspose.Pdf.

list-pdf-signature-names.title: List Signature Names in PDF
list-pdf-signature-names.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve and display all digital signature names from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-image.title: Sign PDF with Image Signature
sign-pdf-with-image.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

sign-pdf-visible-last-page.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
sign-pdf-visible-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible digital signature to the bottom‑right corner of the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

locale-specific-signature.title: Locale-Specific Signature Text in PDF
locale-specific-signature.description: Adds a visible digital signature to a PDF with signature text adapted to German, Spanish, or Japanese locales using Aspose.Pdf appearance settings.

remove-and-resign-pdf.title: Remove Existing Signatures and Re‑sign PDF with New Certificate
remove-and-resign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove all signatures from a PDF and then apply a new digital signature using an updated certificate.

verify-pdf-no-signatures.title: Verify PDF Without Signatures Returns False
verify-pdf-no-signatures.description: Demonstrates checking a PDF that has no digital signatures using PdfFileSignature.VerifySigned, which returns false.

remove-pdf-signatures.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs in a Directory
remove-pdf-signatures.description: Recursively scans a directory for PDF files, removes all digital signatures from each PDF, and saves a new file with a suffix.

extract-certificate-serial-number.title: Extract Signing Certificate Serial Number from PDF
extract-certificate-serial-number.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts the signing certificate from the first signature field, and logs its serial number for audit purposes.

list-signature-reason-location.title: List Signature Reasons and Locations in PDF
list-signature-reason-location.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate digital signatures in a PDF and output each signature's reason and location metadata.

sign-pdf-hidden-appearance.title: Sign PDF with Hidden Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-hidden-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to apply a cryptographically valid digital signature to a PDF while completely hiding the visual appearance.
